parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_logs (event_type, actor, engagement_id, entity_type, entity_id, payload)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.event_type }}',
  '{{ $json.actor }}',
  {{ $json.engagement_id ? "'" + $json.engagement_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.entity_type ? "'" + $json.entity_type + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.entity_id ? "'" + $json.entity_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.payload).replace(/'/g,"''") }}'::jsonb
)
RETURNING id, event_type, created_at;

meta.description: RECON OS WF-19: Audit Logger — append-only audit trail for all RECON OS events. Critical events (OOS blocks, scope changes, retest failures) also alert to Slack. Never deletes records.
